name: AgencyPlatform
description:
What is AgencyPlatform?

AgencyPlatform is a digital marketing tool for agencies. It offers them a strong way to handle and grow their clients' online image. It ensures agencies can easily handle many clients, places, and projects in a centralized place. The platform improves tasks, makes them easier, and gives useful tips.

Thus, agencies guarantee remarkable outcomes, which improve client satisfaction and boost their business. The platform can also be customized to increase the brand's identity and worth.

Source: AgencyPlatform

Key features

Some of the key features of AgencyPlatform include:

  • Automated marketing insights, which provide real-time marketing effort results and future projections.
  • Transparent project management platform where clients and team members can see the progress of projects.
  • White label for customization of the website.
  • Local SEO tools for competitor analysis, local SEO analysis, and suggestions for improvement.
  • Social media management, such as post scheduling and providing insights into social media engagement.

Benefits of Using AgencyPlatform

The benefits of using AgencyPlatform include:

  • It promotes a trustworthy relationship between the agency and its clients.
  • It provides automated analysis to boost marketing efforts and make improvements where needed.
  • It offers extensive marketing management, including paid ads, local SEO services, and link building.

Pricing

  • Bronze plan at $60.00/month
  • Silver plan at $132.00/month
  • Gold at $252.00/month
  • Platinum at $504.00/month

Pros

  • Reliable
  • AI-automated audit reports
  • Social media management

Cons

  • It may be expensive for new agencies
  • Limited customization for lower plans
